name:
EASTER VIGIL
IN THE HOLY NIGHT

lectionary.gospelTitle: The Women Find the Tomb Empty (Lk 24:1-12)
lectionary.thematicTag: Easter Vigil — In the Holy Night

readings.summary: The Lord calls and will make a lasting covenant.
The Lord returns the people to their land.
The women find the tomb empty.

planningNotes: SAT 7 PM — Easter Vigil, all ensembles combined
Procession with Paschal Candle; Exultet; Service of Readings; Baptismal Liturgy; Liturgy of the Eucharist
First Alleluia of Easter sung after 7th reading / Epistle
Litany of Saints during procession to font
Neophytes receive Eucharist for first time
Reading 1 Musical Setting: Genesis Reading (Rory Cooney)
Reading 2 Musical Setting: Exodus Reading Acclamation (Fr. Jerome Kaywell)
Canticle: Is 12 You Will Draw Water (Ed Archer, BPM 112)
Psalm 118 from Mass of New Beginnings (Clifford Petty / verses adapt. David Lockwood, BPM 138)

massNotes: SAT 7 PM — Easter Vigil, all ensembles combined
Procession: Lumen de Lumine (Berthier/Taizé, adapt. Ed Archer)
Exultet: This Is the Night (Tony Alonso)
Homily Song: You Say (Lauren Daigle, arr. Dan Galbraith, BPM 74)
Litany of the Saints (Tony Alonso, BPM 98)
Baptismal Acclamation: Springs of Water (Clifford Petty, adapt. David Lockwood, BPM 120)
Acclamation for Baptisms: Gospel Acclamation from Mass of New Beginnings (Petty, BPM 138)
Sprinkling: Lead Us to the Water (Tom Kendzia & Gary Daigle)

gloria.title: Glory to God from Mass of Joy & Peace

gospelAcclamation.title: Gospel Acclamation from Mass of New Beginnings

communionSongs.title: I Am the Bread of Life
